framework.name: Incentive Matching Pricing
framework.description: Align pricing model (hourly/project/monthly/usage) with both client's goals AND type of work required. Match payment structure to who bears risk and when value is created. Not about what you deserve, but about structural alignment of incentives between provider and client.
framework.raw_quote: incentive matching is aligning your pricing model with both the client's goals and the type of work required to achieve optimal outcomes for everyone. The main idea is just that your pricing structure should naturally encourage the right behaviors and outcomes for both you and your employees if you have any and your client.

source.title: $50/Hour to $10K Agents: AI Voice Agency Pricing Masterclass
